HAKUREIREIMU-MAX_FOLLOW_DANMAKU_COUNT.ho:
Determines how many following danmaku effects can exist on the field at the same time.
If you experience lag, try [gold]reducing[/gold] this value.
HAKUREIREIMU-USE_STATIC_ENERGY_ICON.hove: When enabled, the card's energy icon will not glow dynamically over time.
HAKUREIREIMU-USE_STATIC_ENERGY_COUNTER.h: When enabled, the character's energy counter will not glow dynamically over time.
HAKUREIREIMU-PlaceHolder.title: Explosion Size
